overall.description: A first-person exploration of a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, starting from a sheltered sidewalk with a vending machine, moving through an open intersection with massive circular billboards and steam vents, and ending in a narrow alleyway. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity rendering and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sheltered sidewalk with vending machine and makeshift camp

events.description: camera begins walking forward from a stationary position near the vending machine

agents.ego_description: starting to walk forward from a stationary position, leaving a makeshift camp setup with a tent and illuminated table

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a chair near the yellow vending machine, looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: large yellow vending machine with red neon signage and warning labels
small dome tent with blue and gray panels set up on the sidewalk
table illuminated with red neon light displaying various items and containers
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking part of the street
red neon sign on building facade in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sheltered sidewalk at night, dominated by a yellow vending machine with red neon lighting. A person sits nearby while a makeshift camp with a tent and red-lit table occupies the center. The camera starts moving forward, leaving this semi-enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with steam vents and palm trees

events.description: exits sheltered sidewalk into open street with steam rising from manhole covers
begins turning left and looking toward the large circular billboard towers

agents.ego_description: walking through the open intersection toward the illuminated billboards, navigating around steam vents

entered.detail: massive cylindrical tower with rotating circular LED screens displaying advertisements
steam rising from a manhole cover in the middle of the wet street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
concrete wall with colorful graffiti and metal fencing
tall street lamps illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the sheltered area into a wide-open intersection. Steam rises from a manhole in the center of the wet asphalt street. Large circular billboard towers become visible in the distance, surrounded by palm trees and graffiti-covered walls. The camera walks forward and begins turning left toward the towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the top of the circular billboard tower while continuing to circle around it
floating billboard platform suspended between palm trees becomes visible against the night sky

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the massive billboard towers, looking up at the rotating advertisements and floating platforms

entered.detail: rectangular billboard suspended by cables between palm trees high above the street
tall buildings with purple and red neon lighting visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the massive circular billboard towers, tilting upward to take in the scale of the rotating advertisements. A floating billboard platform suspended between palm trees becomes visible. The environment is an open plaza surrounded by neon-lit buildings and palm trees, with the camera maintaining an upward gaze as it moves.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back street with metal railings and trash piles

events.description: enters narrower street with white metal railings on both sides, moving away from the main intersection

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow street between buildings, passing piles of trash bags and metal railings

entered.detail: white horizontal metal railings lining the left side of the narrow street
pile of blue and white garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with overhead wires running along the street
low-rise residential buildings with fences lining the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrower back street flanked by white metal railings and low-rise buildings. Piles of trash bags sit on the sidewalk. The massive circular billboard towers are now visible in the distance to the left, while the camera continues walking down the confined alleyway away from the main intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit sidewalk into a sprawling urban intersection before retreating into a confined back street. It begins in a semi-enclosed space dominated by a yellow vending machine and a makeshift camp, moving forward to leave the shelter behind. As the camera emerges into a wide-open intersection, the view expands across wet asphalt with rising steam toward distant circular billboard towers and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then shifts as the camera circles these massive rotating advertisements, tilting upward to capture floating platforms and neon-lit buildings amidst palm trees. Finally, the perspective turns away from the plaza and enters a narrow alleyway flanked by white metal railings and piles of trash, leaving the towering billboards behind in the distance.
